macros.token: --output-dir 'downloads' --summary '$summary' --retries $advanced.retries #if str($advanced.max_files) != '': --max-files $advanced.max_files #end if #if str($advanced.max_bytes) != '': --max-bytes $advanced.max_bytes #end if #if $advanced.dry_run: --dry-run #end if #if $advanced.continue_on_error: --continue-on-error #end if --jobs "\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1}"

param.name: max_files
param.label: Maximum number of files
param.help: Stop after downloading this many files. Leave blank for no limit.

param.name: max_bytes
param.label: Approximate size budget (bytes)
param.help: Stop once the cumulative download size exceeds this. Leave blank for no limit.

param.name: dry_run
param.label: Dry run
param.help: Resolve the selection and report what would be downloaded, without downloading.

param.name: continue_on_error
param.label: Continue on error
param.help: Succeed even if some files fail; failures are still recorded in the summary.

param.name: token
param.label: Controlled-access token file
param.help: Optional. Upload your download token to fetch controlled-access files. The token dataset persists in your history — handle it in accordance with the repository's Data Use Agreement.

macros.token:
**Outputs**
- A **dataset collection** containing every downloaded file, ready to feed into downstream Galaxy tools and workflows. - A **summary** table (one row per file) listing the identifier, filename, status, size, checksum and source.
**Notes**
- Downloads are streamed with retries and checksum verification where the repository publishes checksums. - Use *Advanced options → Dry run* to preview the selection before downloading.
